task_completion.description: Four Domain shapes are created with exact labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for shapes or containers labeled exactly 'Supply Chain', 'Sales & Marketing', 'HR & Support', and 'Finance'.

task_completion.description: Ten Capability shapes are created and correctly nested within their respective Domains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 10 capability shapes placed inside or clearly grouped under the correct domain containers (e.g., 'Procurement', 'Inventory Management', and 'Logistics & Fulfillment' under 'Supply Chain').

task_completion.description: Capability shapes are color-coded correctly based on their status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the fill colors of the capability shapes: Healthy capabilities (e.g., Procurement, Campaign Management) should be light green, At Risk (e.g., Logistics & Fulfillment, Talent Acquisition) should be light yellow, and Critical (e.g., Inventory Management, Customer 360) should be light red.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as a .drawio file and exported as a PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the diagrams.net window title showing 'capability_map.drawio', export dialogs for PDF, or a file explorer window showing 'capability_map.drawio' and 'capability_map.pdf' in the Diagrams folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the diagrams.net (drawio) graphical interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the diagrams.net (drawio) application window with the diagram being edited or generated via its CSV import tool, rather than a text editor modifying XML.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the GUI creation of the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show Python or bash scripts generating the .drawio or .pdf files directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Domains: Supply Chain, Sales & Marketing, HR & Support, Finance. 
Capabilities & Colors:
- Supply Chain: Procurement (Green), Inventory Management (Red), Logistics & Fulfillment (Yellow)
- Sales & Marketing: Campaign Management (Green), Customer 360 (Red), E-Commerce Storefront (Green)
- HR & Support: Talent Acquisition (Yellow), Payroll & Benefits (Green)
- Finance: Financial Planning (Yellow), General Ledger (Green)
Colors: Green (#d5e8d4), Yellow (#fff2cc), Red (#f8cecc).
Output files: ~/Diagrams/capability_map.drawio and ~/Diagrams/capability_map.pdf.
